news.headline: Global MV camera market to increase by $2.02B from 2025-2029, with CAGR of over 9.9%, according to Technavio.
news.summary: The machine vision (MV) camera market is projected to witness significant growth, with a predicted increase of USD 2.02 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth is expected to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 9.9% over the forecast period. This data comes from a recent report by Technavio, highlighting the substantial expansion anticipated in the global MV camera market in the coming years.

news.headline: Wounded Warrior Project backs Doug Collins' nomination for U.S. VA Secretary; Collins to go through 119th confirmation process.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida on January 3, 2025, the Wounded Warrior Project® (WWP) expressed their congratulations to former Rep. Doug Collins on his nomination for the position of the 12th secretary of the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (VA). The organization anticipates his confirmation process as the 119th official in this role.

news.headline: Alamos Gold's RS Rating increases from 79 to 84 due to improving price performance, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Alamos Gold has experienced an increase in its price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 79 to 84. This improvement is a positive sign for the company's stock, indicating a stronger performance compared to its peers. This update was mentioned in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: GM leads in 2024 US auto sales; EV and hybrid sales rise for other automakers, not Tesla.
news.summary: In 2024, GM emerged as the top-selling auto company in the U.S., surpassing all competitors. During the same period, sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and hybrids saw a significant increase almost universally among major auto manufacturers. These surges were notable enough to impact the market, driving competition in the industry. Notably, Tesla was exempt from this trend as other auto giants experienced remarkable growth in EV and hybrid sales.

news.headline: Palisade Bio grants equity to new employee under Nasdaq rule, Carlsbad, CA, Jan. 3, 2025 (PALI).
news.summary: Palisade Bio, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Carlsbad, California, and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol PALI, has disclosed an equity grant to a newly hired staff member as part of its 2021 Inducement Plan. The company, specializing in research and development of innovative treatments for individuals suffering from autoimmune, inflammatory, and fibrotic conditions, revealed this information on January 3, 2025. This move indicates Palisade Bio's ongoing commitment to fostering talent within its workforce and driving advancements in the healthcare sector.

View the logistics of transporting fine wine on Bloomberg.
Women We Admire announces Top Women Leaders of 2024; celebrate authenticity, creativity, resilience.
news.summary: Women We Admire is excited to reveal The Top Women Leaders of 2024. The list includes exceptional women who embody authenticity, creativity, and resilience. These leaders showcase remarkable analytical skills and are paving the way for others. This announcement comes from New York and was released on January 3, 2025, through PRNewswire-PRWeb. This recognition highlights their outstanding contributions and serves as a tribute to their impactful leadership.

news.headline: embedUR systems partners with STMicroelectronics to deliver high-performance Edge AI solutions on STM32 microcontrollers in Silicon Valley, Calif. - PRNewswire-PRWeb, Jan. 3, 2025. #EdgeAI #STM32
news.summary: embedUR systems, a Silicon Valley-based company specializing in embedded solutions and Edge AI technologies, announced on January 3, 2025, its participation in STMicroelectronics' Authorized Partner program. This collaboration aims to deliver high-performance Edge AI solutions using STM32 microcontrollers. This move solidifies embedUR systems' position as a key player in the industry, reflecting the demand for advanced AI technologies within the embedded systems sector. The partnership with STMicroelectronics underscores the commitment to innovation and excellence, offering cutting-edge solutions to meet the evolving needs of the market.

news.headline: NexGen Health in San Jose introduced SECA Scale body composition analysis tool for detailed health metrics.
news.summary: A healthcare facility in San Jose, NexGen Health, has recently unveiled the SECA Scale, a state-of-the-art body composition analysis tool. This advanced technology offers comprehensive measurements including skeletal weight, lean body mass, and hydration levels. The SECA Scale aims to improve the efficiency of various treatments like EvolveX and GLP-1. This innovation demonstrates NexGen Health's commitment to providing advanced care solutions.

news.headline: Global satellite-based earth observation market to grow by $9.66 billion by 2029 at a CAGR of over 12%, reports Technavio.
news.summary: As of January 3, 2025, the global market for satellite-based earth observation is projected to increase by approximately $9.66 billion between 2025 and 2029, as stated by Technavio. This market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of over 12% throughout the forecast period. The report offers detailed insights into...

news.headline: PharmaTher grants 800,000 stock options at $0.22/share to two directors, vesting immediately, expiring Jan 2, 2030. CEO not included.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, PharmaTher Holdings Ltd. awarded a combined total of 800,000 stock options to two out of three directors, each option exercisable at $0.22 per share. These options were fully vested upon issuance and are valid until January 2, 2030. Notably, the Chairman and CEO, Fabio Chianelli, did not receive any stock options as part of this allocation. PharmaTher, a specialty pharmaceutical company, made this announcement.

news.headline: Valvoline advises on preparing vehicles for winter with extreme conditions amid Polar Vortex. Jan. 3, 2025. (NYSE: VVV)
news.summary: In anticipation of chilly temperatures and harsh winter weather, individuals in the United States are urged to ready their vehicles for extreme conditions. Valvoline Inc. (NYSE: VVV), a prominent figure in preventive automotive care, based in LEXINGTON, Ky., stresses the importance of ensuring cars are prepared for the challenges ahead as of January 3, 2025.

news.headline: Fuel cells for marine vessels market to grow by USD 234.6 million (2025-2029) at a CAGR of 7.8%, driven by demand for alternate propulsion and AI-driven transformation - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report analyzing the influence of AI on market patterns, it was projected that the global market for fuel cells utilized in marine vessels is set to increase by approximately USD 234.6 million between 2025 and 2029. Technavio predicts a consistent growth trajectory for this market, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.8% during the specified forecast period.

news.headline: Rubio confirmation hearing scheduled for week of January 13th, according to Axios.
Mazda sets new records with total Dec. sales of 40,201 vehicles (+1.7%) and full-year sales of 424,382 (+16.8%) in the U.S.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on January 3, 2025, Mazda North American Operations (MNAO) announced that they had achieved total sales of 40,201 vehicles in December, marking a 1.7 percent increase from the same month in 2023. Moreover, their full-year sales for 2024 amounted to 424,382 vehicles, reflecting a substantial 16.8 percent growth compared to the previous year. This positive momentum indicates a strong performance for Mazda in the North American market.

news.headline: Stocks may face challenges under Trump if rates continue to rise.
Boeing appoints Dana Deasy as Chief Information Digital Officer effective Dec 31, 2024, in Arlington.
news.summary: Boeing (NYSE: BA) made an announcement in Arlington, Virginia on January 3, 2025, regarding the appointment of Dana Deasy as their new Chief Information Digital Officer and Senior Vice President of Information Technology & Data Analytics. Deasy officially assumed the role on December 31, 2024. In this position, he will be responsible for supervising all elements of the company's digital information and technology operations.

news.headline: Global grass-fed beef market to grow by USD 3.23 billion (2025-2029) with a 4.9% CAGR, driven by AI and vendor strategies.
news.summary: A recent study shows that artificial intelligence (AI) is playing a significant role in reshaping markets. Specifically, the global grass-fed beef market is projected to experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 3.23 billion expected between 2025 and 2029. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market is set to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 4.9% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: BriaCell reschedules Annual General Meeting of Shareholders to Feb 5, 2025, due to postal disruption. Record date: Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., a biotechnology company focusing on developing immunotherapies for cancer, announced the rescheduling of its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. Originally set for Jan. 23, 2025, the meeting will now take place on Feb. 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. (ET) in Toronto, Ontario. The record date remains December 9, 2024. The postponement is due to postal service disruptions in Canada, allowing more time to gather proxies. BriaCell is listed as (Nasdaq: BCTX, BCTXW) and (TSX: BCT).

news.headline: BriaCell to consolidate shares on a 1:15 basis for Nasdaq compliance.
news.summary: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, operating in Philadelphia and Vancouver, British Columbia, announced today the approval of a consolidation plan for its common shares. The plan, approved by the board of directors, will consolidate the Company's issued and outstanding common shares on a ratio of 1 post-Consolidation Common Share for every 15 pre-Consolidation Common Shares. The company's shares are listed on Nasdaq under the tickers BCTX and BCTXW, as well as on TSX under the ticker BCT. The consolidation, termed the "Consolidation," aims to ensure compliance with the listing requirements of The Nasdaq Capital Market.

news.headline: Wall Street rallies on soft inflation data, bonds rebound, travel stocks surge. PCE index rose 2.4% YoY in Nov.
news.summary: Positive investor sentiment returned to Wall Street on Friday as November inflation figures came in below expectations, prompting a strong market rebound after the recent Federal Reserve meeting-induced sell-off. The Personal Consumption Expenditure price index saw a 2.4% year-over-year increase, lower than the anticipated 2.5%. The core PCE, closely monitored by the Fed, also fell short, rising 2.8% rather than the forecasted 2.9%. By midday, all major indices were rallying, with broad sector gains. In the S&P 500, 480 companies were up, and every sector advanced, relieved by the easing inflationary pressures. Real estate led the rally, bouncing back strongly post-Fed meeting woes. Small-cap stocks in the Russell 2000 also surged, mainly driven by regional bank recoveries. The travel industry saw significant growth on positive earnings and guidance.

news.headline: Stocks drop as traders rethink Santa Rally. Traders concerned about Trump admin & Fed policies. Nasdaq falls 2%, Bitcoin at $94,000.
news.summary: Volatility struck Wall Street on Friday as a four-day uptrend was disrupted by selling pressure amid uncertainty surrounding the economic policies of the incoming Trump administration and the Federal Reserve's future plans. Midday trading in New York saw major indices plunging significantly, undoing the gains from earlier in the week and casting doubt on a potential Santa Rally. The Nasdaq 100, dominated by tech stocks, plummeted by 2%, marking its second-worst performance this month. Meanwhile, both the S&P 500 and the Dow Jones also experienced considerable declines, with small cap stocks performing worse than their larger counterparts. In economic news, the U.S. goods trade deficit ballooned to $102.86 billion in November 2024, exceeding the anticipated $100.7 billion, driven by a 4.5% increase in imports.

news.headline: Jane Cronin joins Cleveland-Cliffs' board, adding expertise to steer the company's operations.
news.summary: An increase in the global temperature of 1.5 degrees Celsius is projected to occur within the next two decades, according to recent scientific reports. This rise in temperature is expected to have significant implications, including more frequent occurrences of extreme weather events and impacts on various ecosystems. The report also suggests that if current trends continue, the global average temperature could increase by 2 degrees Celsius by 2100. This temperature increase would result in a substantial rise in sea levels, potentially affecting millions of people living in coastal areas. Experts warn that urgent action is needed to mitigate these effects and limit the overall impact of climate change.

news.headline: Pro AV market to increase by $180.6 million (2025-2029) driven by digital signage, AI transformation.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the influence of artificial intelligence on market patterns reveals significant growth projections for the global professional audiovisual (pro AV) market. According to Technavio, the market is expected to increase by a noteworthy USD 180.6 million between 2025 and 2029. The forecast indicates a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.4% during this period. This surge in growth is attributed to the heightened utilization of AI technologies in the industry.

news.headline: Solowin Holdings invests $10M in AlloyX's Pre-A funding round, a stablecoin infrastructure firm, via Solomon JFZ (Asia) Holdings.
news.summary: Today, in Hong Kong on Jan. 03, 2025, SOLOWIN HOLDINGS (Nasdaq: SWIN) revealed its strategic investment in AlloyX Limited during the Pre-A funding round. This move involved a fund managed by SOLOWIN’s subsidiary Solomon JFZ (Asia) Holdings Limited. AlloyX, an Asia-centered stablecoin infrastructure firm, received the investment from the leading financial services company. SWIN continues to cater to high-net-worth individuals and institutional investors by offering solutions for traditional and virtual assets.

news.headline: Iveco Group's Thomas Hilse, previously President of Firefighting Business Unit, steps down after serving in roles from 2021.
news.summary: Turin, on January 3, 2025 - Iveco Group N.V. (EXM: IVG) has disclosed that Thomas Hilse, the President of the Firefighting Business Unit of Iveco Group and CEO of Magirus GmbH, is stepping down from his position immediately to explore new prospects. Hilse has been in these roles since 2021. He played a pivotal role in overseeing the transition of Magirus GmbH to Mutares SE & Co. KGaA (ISIN: DE000A2NB650), as reported earlier today.

news.headline: Global pet dietary supplements market to grow $1.26 billion in 2024-2029, with 7.1% CAGR per Technavio.
news.summary: As of January 3, 2025, the global market for pet dietary supplements is projected to increase by approximately USD 1.26 billion between 2025 and 2029, as indicated by research from Technavio. It is anticipated that the market will experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of around 7.1% throughout this forecast period. The detailed report offers an in-depth analysis of the market trends, opportunities, and challenges within this sector.

news.headline: Invst acquires NS Capital, forms INVST Unity Pooled Employer Plan to revolutionize retirement solutions for businesses.
news.summary: An Indianapolis, Indiana registered investment advisor, Invst, has recently acquired NS Capital, a registered investment advisor based in Stamford, Connecticut. This strategic acquisition aims to revolutionize how businesses manage employee retirement solutions. This partnership has led to the creation of the INVST Unity Pooled Employer Plan, marking a significant advancement in Invst's capacity to provide high-quality retirement plans. This move solidifies their position as a market leader in the retirement planning sector.

news.headline: Solana is now secure from quantum threats with new cryptographic technique, ensuring network protection in the future.
news.summary: Software developers recently introduced a cryptographic method to enhance the security of Solana's network. This technique serves the purpose of shielding the network against potential quantum threats in the future. This update is crucial for safeguarding the system and ensuring that it remains resilient against any emerging security risks. By adopting this advanced cryptographic solution, Solana is taking proactive steps to protect its network and the approximately 400 projects currently utilizing its ecosystem. This development signifies a significant move in fortifying the platform's defense mechanisms and securing the assets and data of its users.

news.headline: Stock market indexes close higher with Nasdaq up 1.8%, Dow Jones and S&P 500 rebounded. Tesla and Nvidia stocks gained.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 experienced a recovery on the stock market. Both Tesla and Nvidia witnessed a significant increase in their stock value, along with two artificial intelligence stocks that surged. The Nasdaq showed a strong rally of 1.8%. The market closed near its peak for the day, with investors closely following the live coverage of these developments.

news.headline: Global outdoor backpacks market set to grow by USD 997.1 million from 2025-2029 at nearly 5.4% CAGR, fueled by millennials' hiking trend and AI developments - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market trends, specifically focusing on the global outdoor backpacks market. It is projected that the market size will increase by a substantial USD 997.1 million between 2025 and 2029. This growth is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 5.4%.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency exchanges to offer full banking services by 2027 with the rise of crypto loans, savings accounts, and Bitcoin wallets. G20 aims to tax crypto transactions by 2027, as 48 countries commit to tax transparency. Traditional banks to disclose digital asset exposure from 2026, leading to increased financial inclusion.
news.summary: The article discusses how cryptocurrency is changing the way people spend money, with a shift towards decentralized systems and financial tools like crypto loans and savings accounts. Recent global developments, including more crypto-friendly regulations and increased crypto loan accessibility, are driving the move towards a more integrated financial ecosystem. By 2027, digital asset platforms could evolve into full-fledged financial institutions offering services like interest-earning accounts and seamless payment solutions. Regulatory milestones include the approval of Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, with further transformative changes expected in 2026-2027, as countries align their strategies for taxing cryptocurrency transactions. Around 48 countries plan to adopt a tax transparency standard by 2027. Banking institutions are also expected to disclose their exposure to digital assets starting in 2026. Financial inclusion remains a challenge, with banks favoring certain individuals due to centralized structures and rigorous processes.

news.headline: ROCKWOOL A/S announces buy-back program transactions.
news.summary: According to recent updates, the current inflation rate has surged to 5.3% in comparison to the previous year. This rise in inflation is the highest recorded since 2008. Furthermore, the consumer price index has seen an increase of 0.3% in the past month alone. Economists attribute this surge to various factors, including supply chain disruptions, increased consumer demand, and rising energy prices. Despite efforts by the government to stabilize the situation, the inflation rate continues to climb, impacting the cost of goods and services for the average consumer. Experts predict that if this trend continues, it could have long-term consequences on the economy.

news.headline: CNO Financial Group appoints Joel Koehneman as Chief Accounting Officer, starting Jan. 21, 2025. Koehneman has public accounting experience.
news.summary: A new Chief Accounting Officer, Joel Koehneman, has been appointed by CNO Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CNO) in Carmel, Ind., starting from January 21, 2025. He will be reporting directly to the Chief Financial Officer, Paul McDonough. Joel's background in public accounting makes him a valuable addition to CNO's team.

news.headline: Access earnings reports on-the-go with MODL by Bloomberg Pro Services for insights. A convenient tool for staying informed.
news.summary: Stay up-to-date with earnings reports using MODL, an innovative feature from Bloomberg Professional Services. Access important insights and track financial performance wherever you are. Keep informed and manage your investments efficiently with this convenient tool.

news.headline: Aptiv (NYSE: APTV) to announce Q4 2024 results on Feb 6, 2025. Investor call at 8:00 am EST. Hosted by CEO and CFO. Webcast link at ir.aptiv.com.
news.summary: Aptiv PLC, a company listed on NYSE as APTV, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 6, 2025. An investor call is scheduled for the same day at 8:00 a.m. EST, featuring Chairman and CEO Kevin Clark, along with CFO Varun Laroyia. The event can be accessed through a live webcast and presentation materials on the Aptiv Investor Relations website at ir.aptiv.com. This communication was released from Schaffhausen, Switzerland.

news.headline: Revelyst acquisition by SVP funds in Providence and Greenwich is now complete per Business Wire statement.
news.summary: A recent acquisition was finalized as Strategic Value Partners (SVP) completed the acquisition of Revelyst, a company based in Providence, R.I. and Greenwich, Conn. SVP, a leading investment firm, managed funds for the transaction. The acquisition was publicly announced earlier and has now been successfully completed, marking a significant milestone. The details of the acquisition, including financial figures and terms of the deal, were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: MicroStrategy aims to raise $2 billion through public offerings for capital plan to gather $21 billion equities and fixed income instruments.
news.summary: MicroStrategy Incorporated, based in Tysons Corner, VA, is pursuing its 21/21 Plan, aiming to secure $21 billion in equity and $21 billion in fixed income instruments within three years. As part of this plan, the company is looking to raise up to $2 billion through public underwritten offerings of perpetual preferred stock. This move comes as MicroStrategy continues its strategic financial initiatives. MicroStrategy is listed on Nasdaq as MSTR.

news.headline: Pearl Diver Credit Co. declares $0.2389 monthly dividends on 8.00% Series A Term Preferred Stock Due 2029.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on January 3, 2025, Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. unveiled its latest dividend update. The Board of Directors approved a monthly dividend for shareholders of the 8.00% Series A Term Preferred Stock Due 2029. The dividend amount set per share is $0.2389. The Company's shares are included in the NYSE under the ticker symbols PDCC and PDPA.

news.headline: Iveco Group transfers ownership of MAGIRUS to Mutares, subject to agreement terms outlined in 2024, reflecting 2024 business performance.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Iveco Group N.V. (EXM: IVG) disclosed the transfer of full ownership of Magirus GmbH and its firefighting business affiliates to Mutares SE & Co. KGaA. This move is in accordance with the agreement outlined on March 13, 2024. The transfer is subject to contractual price adjustments mainly based on MAGIRUS's business performance in 2024. The acquiring company, Mutares SE & Co. KGaA (ISIN: DE000A2NB650), will now take over the operations previously held by Iveco Group N.V.

news.headline: Creative Realities' CFO, Will Logan, resigns to join Rough Country, effective January 31st, 2025. He will serve as a Strategic Advisor to CRI till end of 2025.
news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky, January 3, 2025 - Creative Realities, Inc. (NASDAQ: CREX), a top provider of digital signage and media solutions, shared news of Will Logan stepping down as Chief Financial Officer, with his resignation effective from January 31, 2025. Logan will assume the role of Chief Financial Officer at Rough Country, renowned in the truck, Jeep, and UTV enthusiast market for its performance-enhancing products and suspension systems. While taking on his new role, Logan will also act as a Strategic Advisor to Creative Realities, Inc. until at least the conclusion of 2025. The Company looks forward to maintaining its growth momentum and advancing its successful business strategy under these changes.

news.headline: Business First Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: BFST) to release Q4 2024 earnings on Jan. 23, 2025, with a conference call at 4:00 p.m. CDT.
news.summary: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, on January 3, 2025, Business First Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: BFST) revealed plans to unveil its Q4 2024 earnings post-market closure on January 23, 2025. This information pertains to the parent company of b1BANK. To delve deeper into these results, executive management will conduct a conference call and webcast on the same day, at 4:00 p.m. CDT.

news.headline: Brookfield Renewable to discuss Q4 2024 results in conference call on Jan 31, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Brookfield Renewable, a leading renewable energy company listed on NYSE (BEP, BEPC) and TSX (BEP.UN, BEPC), announced that they will be hosting their Fourth Quarter 2024 Conference Call and Webcast on January 31, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. This event will focus on discussing the company’s financial results and upcoming business ventures.

news.headline: Brookfield Infrastructure to hold Q4 2024 conference call on Jan 30 at 9:00 a.m. (ET) - announced on Jan 3, 2025.
news.summary: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners has scheduled its fourth quarter 2024 conference call and webcast for Thursday, January 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Rakovina Therapeutics (TSX: RKV) to join industry leaders at 43rd J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conf Week in San Francisco Jan 13-16.
news.summary: Rakovina Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical firm concentrating on crafting innovative cancer treatments utilizing unique DNA-damage response technologies, is excited to reveal its involvement in activities and gatherings coinciding with the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference slated for January 13-16, 2025, in San Francisco. The company is listed on TSX under the symbol RKV.

news.headline: USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: USCB) to reveal Q4 2024 results on Jan 23, 2025 post-market close.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2024, after the market closes on Thursday, January 23, 2025. The Company, listed as NASDAQ: USCB, will make this report public, providing stakeholders and investors with crucial insights into their performance during this period. This update signifies a significant event for the Company as they share key figures and data that will impact their standing in the market.

news.headline: Olema Oncology granted 26,200 stock options to 3 employees under Nasdaq rule, advancing breast cancer therapies.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed that they provided stock options to three fresh employees to buy a total of 26,200 shares of the company's common stock on January 2, 2025. These grants were sanctioned by the Compensation Committee of Olema’s Board of Directors and issued under the Company's 2022 Inducement Plan as a crucial inducement for the new hires joining Olema. Olema is recognized for its focus on developing targeted therapies for breast cancer and related conditions. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol OLMA, is entrenched in the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical sector.

news.headline: ORIC Pharmaceuticals grants 16,400 stock options and 2,800 restricted stock units to new non-executive employee.
news.summary: On January 2, 2025, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ORIC, located in South San Francisco and San Diego, disclosed that they provided 16,400 non-qualified stock options and 2,800 restricted stock units to a new non-executive employee who joined the company in December 2024. These grants were made as part of the employee's compensation package to aid in attracting and retaining talent within the organization. ORIC, which specializes in developing therapies targeting therapeutic resistance mechanisms in oncology, aims to enhance its workforce with skilled individuals in pursuit of its research and development goals.

news.headline: Assertio Holdings, Inc. granted its new Senior VP 62,500 RSUs and 275,000 stock options on Dec 23, 2024.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in Lake Forest, Illinois, Assertio Holdings, Inc. revealed that Mary Pietryga, the new Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, was granted 62,500 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 275,000 stock options by the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors on December 23, 2024. Assertio, traded as NASDAQ: ASRT, is a pharmaceutical firm known for providing unique products to patients through its robust commercial infrastructure. Mary Pietryga, aged 62, has received these incentives as part of her compensation package.
